prompt: Monochromatic logo design on pure black background. A perfect circle with a thick pure white (#FFFFFF) border ring. Inside the circle is solid black. In the center, two lines of text stacked: 'MM' on top line and 'AGENCY' on bottom line, both in bold pure white (#FFFFFF) uppercase. CRITICAL: Both lines use the EXACT SAME typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Everything is pure white on black — no yellow, no gray, no color. Monochromatic. Wide rectangular letterforms, sharp corners. Clean vector quality, flat design, perfectly centered.
